message:
test(pages): Add wizard state and validation tests

Adds comprehensive test coverage for pages wizard functionality:

WizardState tests:
- Default state initialization
- Custom configuration
- No-encryption mode
- Attachment support
- Final site directory tracking

DeployTarget tests:
- Display formatting (Local, GitHub, Cloudflare)
- Equality comparisons

ExclusionSet tests:
- Empty set initialization
- Conversation ID exclusions
- Workspace exclusions

Validation tests:
- Password requirement for encryption
- Output directory validation
- Secret scan state tracking

These tests verify non-interactive wizard logic without requiring
user prompts, following the no-mock testing policy.

Progress on: coding_agent_session_search-1rvb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
